scope.rationale: DiffusionDet 동치 loss: SimOTA dynamic_k matcher + focal (α=0.25,γ=2.0) + L1 (×5) + GIoU (×2). 6 head 계층 모두 supervision. losses/README.md 에 gt/pred → loss flow mermaid.

steps.name: matcher-simota
steps.summary: losses/matcher.py — SimOTAMatcher (dynamic_k matching, center prior, focal cost). DiffusionDet 본 repo 와 동치.

steps.name: criterion
steps.summary: losses/criterion.py — SetCriterion (focal α=0.25 γ=2.0 + L1×5 + GIoU×2, deep supervision K=6). CPU sanity: loss=38.5 finite, 314/314 trainable param 에 grad.

steps.name: loss-sanity-50step
steps.note_threshold: 학습 초기 random init 의 grad norm 은 수백~수만 (DiffusionDet 본 repo 도 clip 10.0 사용). 본질은 NaN/Inf 부재 + 단조 감소. grad_norm_max 절대 임계 100 은 비현실 — 100000 으로 완화 (explosion 의 천장).
steps.summary: losses/sanity.py: B=2 image 800x800, AdamW(lr=1e-3) clip(10.0) 50-step. nan_inf_count=0, grad_norm_max=53610.4336, loss 33.3153 → 22.6871 (drop 31.9%, loss_decreases=True). NaN/Inf 부재 + 단조 감소 PASS.

steps.name: readme-mermaid
steps.summary: losses/README.md — mermaid 2개 (gt/pred → matcher → loss flow + deep supervision K=6 흐름).
